title: Build a Heap
hints: Use the bottom-up heap construction approach.
Start from the last parent node (at index n/2 - 1) and work backwards to the root.
For each node, perform down-heapify to ensure the min-heap property is maintained.
In down-heapify, compare the node with its children and swap with the smallest child if needed.
Continue down-heapify recursively until the node is in the correct position or reaches a leaf.
The array representation of a heap has parent at index i, left child at 2*i+1, and right child at 2*i+2.
